meta.title: BudMedia — Advertising on packaging
meta.description: BudMedia delivers free, professionally printed packaging to restaurants — funded by local advertisers. Your ad from 5 DKK per box.

hero.headline: Your ad on local pizza boxes
hero.subheadline: Physical advertising that sits on the kitchen table. Not in a feed.

steps.title: We design your ad
steps.description: Send your logo. We create a print-ready design that fits the packaging.

steps.title: We produce and deliver
steps.description: EU-certified production. Food-safe materials. Delivered directly to partner restaurants.

steps.title: Your customers hold it
steps.description: Every box that leaves the restaurant carries your ad into a local household.

items.name: Pizza boxes
items.description: 32 and 40 cm. Full-colour print. Food-contact approved.

items.name: Delivery bags
items.description: Paper bags with your print. For takeaway and delivery.

restaurantBrief.title: Free packaging for restaurants
restaurantBrief.description: We deliver professionally printed packaging with your logo and branding. Free. No contract. No commitment. The quality matches or exceeds what you pay for today.

items.title: Ad placement
items.description: Your ad printed on the selected number of boxes per month, distributed across your chosen restaurants.

items.title: Professional ad design
items.description: We design the ad from your logo and brand materials.

items.title: Restaurant matching
items.description: We select restaurants that match your target audience and local area.

items.title: Monthly distribution report
items.description: How many boxes distributed, estimated impressions, coverage area.

items.title: Quarterly design refresh
items.description: New ad design every quarter. No extra cost.

boxShowcase.headline: The pizza box as ad space
boxShowcase.description: The restaurant's logo and branding on the lid. Your ad on the side panels. Printed in full colour on food-safe packaging.
boxShowcase.priceNote: Ad space from 5 DKK per box

aboutBrief.title: About BudMedia
aboutBrief.text: BudMedia is a brand by BudGruppen. We connect local advertisers with local restaurants through packaging. Ad revenue stays in the local community — not with international platforms.

contactCta.title: Let's talk about your next campaign
contactCta.success: Thank you. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contactCta.error: Something went wrong. Try again or email kontakt@budmedia.dk directly.
